ogTitle: Murray Gorge vs Murrays Run: Climate Safety

heading: Murray Gorge vs Murrays Run — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Murray Gorge, New South Wales and Murrays Run, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Murray Gorge has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Murrays Run (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Murray Gorge or Murrays Run safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Murray Gorge has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Murrays Run scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Murray Gorge scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Murrays Run scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Murray Gorge or Murrays Run?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Murray Gorge has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
